questions.question: List three common reasons for revoking a digital certificate.
expectedPoints: Change of affiliation (e.g., employee leaves company)
Compromise of the issuing Certificate Authority (CA)

questions.question: Compare and contrast the Certificate Revocation List (CRL) and Online Certificate Status Protocol (OCSP) mechanisms. Your answer should cover the model of operation, key advantages, and key limitations of each.
expectedPoints: CRL uses a pull model; clients download a full list. OCSP uses a push model; clients query for a single certificate.
CRL Advantage: Better privacy for the client. CRL Limitation: High latency and large file sizes.
OCSP Advantage: Near real-time checks. OCSP Limitation: Privacy concerns (CA sees queries) and creates a single point of failure.
Conclusion: Both are necessary, but OCSP Stapling is often a superior modern solution.
